name: Denarius Silver Corp.
summary: Denarius Silver Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of mining projects. The company explores for gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc. It primarily focuses on its 100% owned Lomero Project comprising 454 hectares located in the Huelva Province of Southern Spain, as well as Guia Antigua Project located in Colombia. The company also has an option agreement to acquire Zancudo Project located in Colombia. Denarius Silver Corp. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
